rationale: The citing paper mentions Chan, Padmanabhan, and Seetharaman (2007) only in the literature review and summary table as an example of prior spatial pricing/location research and numerical merger analysis. The citation helps position a broad gap, namely that prior work is spatial or numerical but not dynamic advertising budget optimization with closed-form solutions. The paper does not build its model, estimation strategy, hypotheses, or empirical implementation on this specific study.
